features: Manicure Care Set - The nail clipper kit contains 18 pieces of nail and toenail tools to meet meet what you need,include hand care,facial care,foot care.
Stainless Steel - Our Stainless steel nail tools are made of high quality steel, which is strong and durable, and it will not fade.A new generation of black polishing anti-skid technology.

Portable Lightweight - Manicure set comes with a portable synthetic leather case that is easily opened with a push of a button, You can put the nail art accessories sets tools into your fashion bags, lightweight and Handy when you go traveling.

Best Personal Care Gift - It is an amazing personal care gift for your relatives, friends, parents, husband and wife. The case is made of high quality fabric and PU leather, stylish and elegant,a perfect gift.
Customer Service-If you have any questions, please contact us.
description: Product Description OWILL is committed to providing customers with the best quality products, to give every customer the most satisfactory shopping experience. OWILL nail clipper set, made of carbon steel & stainless steel, is a must-have gadget for daily personal care with high hardness, strong abrasion resistance and easy to rust. Each tool of manicure set is manufactured by the careful process of cutting to make sure it can be used more comfortably. Each tool in this unique pedicure kit is carefully tailored to serve a specific purpose. Experience exceptional difference in your nail, facial, hand and foot care with our carefully crafted Manicure and Pedicure Tool set. Sharpness Upgraded High temperature heat treatment & cold quenching technology forging. Whole Body Washable Will not rust; Recommended to dry and store after washing. Dislocation Design The difference between the knife edges is 0.02mm, which can prevent nail splashing. 360° Rotation After tens of thousands of rotation tests, it can still rotate smoothly and will not fall off. Traditional Ear Pick:For earwax removal Spiral Ear Pick:Can be rotated by 360° to clean auditory meatus Round Loop:For treating squeeze stubborn acnes, blackhead/whiteheads Sharp Needle:For blackhead,acne,pimples and fat granules removal Cuticle Pusher:Sharp to cut or scrape away dead cuticle on one end Nail Cleaner:For cleaning dirt in nail Callus Removal Fork:For pushing and cutting nail cuticle Nail File:It can sand down the large ridges in your nails,it also helps get the glue off. Vibrissae Scissors:For trimming nose hair Flat Callus Remover:For cleaning dead skin of feet Oblique Callus Remover:For cleaning dead skin of feet Scraping Knife:The blade side scrapes the foot gaps and heel, and the teeth side rubs the toe to reduce itch. 18 In 1 Stainless Steel Professional Pedicure Kit Please Wipe Dry After Washing, Keep Dry. Portable Size for Various Occasions
